name: Chicken Pasta Italiana
recipeIngredient: 4 boneless, skinless Chicken Breasts (4 oz each)
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring water to a boil in a medium saucepan.
2. Add white wine, chicken, and garlic. Reduce heat and simmer for 15 minutes or until the chicken is cooked through. Remove the chicken and garlic from the broth, reserving the broth.
3. Let the chicken cool, then cut into 1/2-inch pieces. Set aside.
4. Crush the garlic in a small bowl, add basil, salt, pepper, and lemon juice. Mix well and set aside.
5. Bring the reserved broth to a boil. Add pasta and cook for 12 minutes or until al dente. Drain and rinse under cold water. Drain again.
6. Toss the pasta with olive oil. Combine the reserved garlic-lemon mixture, chicken, pasta, bell peppers, and olives in a large bowl. Gently toss everything together.
7. Chill for at least 1 hour before serving. Spoon the chicken mixture onto lettuce-lined plates. (Fat: 7.7, Cholesterol: 72)
